special_mechanics.name: Cover and Stealth Movement
special_mechanics.description: Side-scrolling segment where player-controlled snipers must avoid searchlights by taking cover behind fences/buildings or using roll, crawl, and dive mechanics. Timing-based movement with cover-based gameplay.

special_mechanics.name: Rappelling Descent
special_mechanics.description: Operative descends the embassy side via rope after being deployed via helicopter. Player controls descent speed and can choose which floor/window to enter.

tier_notes: Tier 3 (qualitative data only). Sources document gameplay mechanics and level structure but contain no quantified physics parameters, acceleration values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel system information. Game is a tactical shooter with multiple distinct gameplay sections (side-scrolling stealth, sniper shooting gallery, first/third-person embassy infiltration) rather than a platformer with traditional jump physics.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (regional differences and ending conditions)
wikipedia - Hostages video game article (gameplay mechanics and sections description)
